action_set_definitions.name: get_patient_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current clinical state of the patient including vitals, lab results, and medication list. Use this to assess surgical candidacy and systemic stability.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_time
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the environment clock by a specified number of days. This tool simulates the passage of time, allowing for healing or recovery from chemotherapy toxicity. It returns the updated state after the duration.

example_output.new_state: Object containing updated vitals and biomarkers after the wait.

action_set_definitions.name: consult_oncology
action_set_definitions.description: Coordinates with the oncology team to get clearance for invasive dental procedures based on current systemic labs.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_dental_procedure
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a dental intervention. For high-risk patients, mandatory surgical protocols (like primary closure) must be specified.

primary_closure.description: Must be true for patients starting bisphosphonates to ensure healing.

action_set_definitions.name: administer_medication
action_set_definitions.description: Prescribes or administers supportive medications such as antibiotics or chlorhexidine.

action_set_definitions.name: finalize_clearance
action_set_definitions.description: Issues the formal dental clearance to the oncologist if all metrics are met.

state_description.vital_signs: Current physiological indicators including heart_rate, blood_pressure (systolic/diastolic), and oxygen_saturation.
state_description.biomarker_levels: Internal laboratory values relevant to the condition (e.g., blood glucose, creatinine, white blood cell count).
state_description.active_medications: A list of medications currently circulating in the patient's system and their remaining effective duration.
state_description.disease_progression_index: A hidden numerical value (0.0 to 1.0) representing the underlying severity or stage of the primary condition.
state_description.cumulative_toxicity: A measure of side-effect accumulation or organ stress from the sequence of treatments.
state_description.treatment_history: A chronological log of all actions executed by the agent and the patient's historical response markers.
